hot_issues.title: [BUG] HTTP Desync Attack (Request Smuggling) → User Impersonation $100
hot_issues.author: zhangjiayang6835-cyber
hot_issues.body_preview:
## 🐛 Bug Bounty: HTTP Desync Attack (Request Smuggling) → User Impersonation
